revenue: $16.67 billion, up 6.4% YoY (from $15.68 billion in Q3 2024)
net_income: $1.42 billion, up 11.4% YoY (from $1.27 billion in Q3 2024)
qoq_changes: The provided excerpt focuses on YoY comparisons; Q3 2025 operating revenue grew by $996 million compared to Q3 2024.
Operating expenses increased by $709 million YoY, primarily driven by higher salaries and ancillary business costs, though offset by lower aircraft fuel costs.
new_risks: No new material risks were explicitly identified in the provided excerpt; management referred back to the risk factors detailed in the 2024 Form 10-K.
management_tone: Bullish, supported by strong top-line revenue growth, double-digit net income expansion, and robust operating cash flows.
analyst_note: Delta Air Lines delivered a strong Q3 2025, characterized by a 6.4% increase in total operating revenue and an 11.4% rise in net income year-over-year. The airline successfully expanded its operating margins despite rising labor costs, benefiting from lower fuel expenses and solid passenger demand.
